title: Workfare Transport Concession Scheme
text:
Workfare Transport Concession Scheme - SupportGoWhere
Workfare Transport Concession Scheme
Share link
Provides recipients of Workfare Income Supplement with concessionary rates for travel on public transport.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
25% off adult public transport fares and option to buy monthly pass at $92 per month
Applications take 14 working days to process
Apply online or at any SimplyGo Ticket Office
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

25% off adult public transport fares

Option to purchase Monthly Public Transport Concession Pass at $92 per month for unlimited travel on train and basic bus services

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen

Aged 30 to 60 years old

Receiving Workfare Income Supplement payments

How to apply?

You can apply:

Via the SimplyGo app

Online at the SimplyGo website

At any SimplyGo Ticket Office

You will need to provide:

Recent passport-sized colour photograph

Where can I find help?

View more details

SimplyGo Hotline: 1800 2255 663

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 04 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
